problem_statement: SchedulerWorkerRuntimeReceiptHandoff records the receipt obligations needed before future worker invocation, but the control plane lacks a Foundation Mode dry-run that proves the future runtime receipt emitter envelope without registering an emitter or admitting dispatch. Without that dry-run, the handoff could remain abstract and a future runtime path could skip runtime receipt emission, worker mesh dispatch receipts, WorkerFailureReceipt binding, raw-output rejection, or terminal-closure blocking.
success_criteria: SchedulerWorkerRuntimeReceiptEmitterDryRun binds SchedulerWorkerRuntimeReceiptHandoff, TemporalSchedulerReceipt, DistributedLeaseExecutionReceipt, WorkerMesh, WorkerFailureReceipt, and Universal Action Orchestration refs

The dry-run records required runtime gates for scheduler lease evidence, distributed lease execution readiness, UAO effect admission, Phi_gov dispatch authorization, runtime receipt emitter registration, runtime receipt schema binding, worker mesh dispatch receipts, WorkerFailureReceipt on error, and effect reconciliation before terminal closure

The dry-run denies scheduler dispatch, runtime runner registration, dispatch endpoint registration, runtime receipt emitter registration, runtime receipt schema binding, runtime dispatch, worker invocation, scheduler mutation, lease backend calls, adapter backend calls, external network, filesystem writes, connector authority, terminal closure, and success claims

The validator rejects authority drift, source handoff drift, missing source refs, missing runtime gates, missing runtime witnesses, missing denied-until refs, missing blocked reasons, simulated result drift, admission drift, receipt ref drift, and contract summary count drift
The dry-run schema is indexed in the governance protocol manifest and included in proof coverage matrix witnesses
No live worker dispatch, scheduler mutation, backend call, connector call, deployment, runtime receipt emission, or production readiness claim is introduced
non_goals: no worker mesh dispatch receipt emission
constraints: dry-run validation must remain deterministic and non-live
SchedulerWorkerRuntimeReceiptHandoff source refs must remain bound
TemporalSchedulerReceipt and DistributedLeaseExecutionReceipt refs must match the source handoff
WorkerFailureReceipt must be required for failed or partial worker dispatch
worker invocation and scheduler mutation flags must remain false
terminal closure must remain blocked until runtime receipt and effect reconciliation evidence exist
evidence_required: focused scheduler worker emitter dry-run validator receipt
standalone SDLC requirement and design validation receipt
workspace governance preflight receipt before closure claim
